pi_items.source: Verified via downloaded shapefile and setup scripts
Direct analysis of the dbf file downloaded from naciscdn.org (Natural Earth v5.1.1)
Direct analysis of the dbf file showing GDP_MD is the correct column name

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real Natural Earth 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' dataset. Due to an update in the dataset (version 5.1.1 downloaded by the environment), the column 'GDP_MD_EST' mentioned in the task prompt has been renamed to 'GDP_MD'. The agent must adapt and use 'GDP_MD' instead. Crucially, the task's evaluation script ('export_result.sh') hardcodes the old column name 'GDP_MD_EST' without a fallback. As a result, the verifier will silently fail to parse the source GDP values, making the task structurally broken: even if the agent perfectly calculates 'GDP_PCAP', the verifier will check zero valid records and award a failing score (max 30/100).
